summary: Live-applied ADR 0291 from the latest realistic origin/main worktree by converging the JupyterHub runtime on docker-runtime-lv3, publishing notebooks.lv3.org through the shared NGINX edge, repairing the fresh-worktree publication preflight plus the dependent OpenBao, Ollama, and Keycloak recovery paths needed for replay stability, and verifying the public OIDC handoff and notebook dependency contract against current platform services.

verification.observed: `make converge-jupyterhub env=production` succeeded on replay `r10` with final recap `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=279 changed=5 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=81 rescued=0 ignored=0`, `localhost : ok=24 changed=0 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=4 rescued=0 ignored=0`, and `nginx-lv3 : ok=40 changed=5 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=6 rescued=0 ignored=0`, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0291-jupyterhub-converge-r10.txt`.

verification.check: Public notebook surface and OIDC handoff
verification.observed: Direct controller probes confirmed `curl -fsS https://notebooks.lv3.org/hub/health` returned success, `curl -fsS -o /dev/null -D - https://notebooks.lv3.org/hub/oauth_login` returned `HTTP/2 302` to `https://sso.lv3.org/realms/lv3/...&client_id=jupyterhub`, and the live edge certificate SAN set includes `DNS:notebooks.lv3.org`, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0291-direct-verification.txt`.

Fresh probes on `docker-runtime-lv3` confirmed `curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/version` returned `{"version":"0.18.2"}`, `curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:8010/healthz` returned `{"status":"ok","collection":"platform_context","memory_collection":"serverclaw_memory","memory_enabled":true}`, and `curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:8097/hub/health` returned success, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0291-direct-verification.txt`.

The final branch-local replay now bootstraps the shared edge-generated portals before publication, while the supporting OpenBao AppRole retry handling, transient Keycloak pull retries, and Ollama compose-project network recovery keep the governed replay stable in a fresh worktree; the recovery evidence is preserved across `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0291-jupyterhub-runtime-replay-r3.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0291-ollama-converge-r4.txt`, and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0291-jupyterhub-converge-r10.txt`.

notes: This receipt captures the branch-local ADR 0291 proof on top of repository version 0.177.108 and current live platform version 0.130.71 before the exact-main integration step.

Two narrow manual prerequisites were required during the branch-local apply: an OpenBao AppRole bootstrap for `jupyterhub-runtime` using the controller-local root token and a Hetzner DNS correction for the `notebooks` A record to `65.108.75.123` in zone `qCw975uU3fTKT4KX66twh`.

Merge-to-main still needs to rerun or reverify the JupyterHub replay from the latest origin/main lineage, refresh the protected `README.md`, `VERSION`, `changelog.md`, `versions/stack.yaml`, and `build/platform-manifest.json` surfaces, and cut a canonical exact-main receipt.
